zh.lifeSummary: 當Guillebert I de  Lannoy於1330年出生在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德蘭諾伊時，他的父親Huges de Lannoy19歲，母親Marguerite de Warvin20歲。他和Catherine de Corbon, dame de Molembaix至少有8個兒子。他去世於1409年8月2日在比利時海瑙特勒斯莫倫白可享年79歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guillebert I de  Lannoy于1330年出生在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德蘭諾伊时，他的父亲Huges de Lannoy19岁，母亲Marguerite de Warvin20岁。他和Catherine de Corbon, dame de Molembaix至少有8个儿子。他去世于1409年8月2日在比利时海瑙特勒斯莫倫白可享年79岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lannoy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: altered form of Flemish Van Oye or Van Hoye (or perhaps an Americanized form of any of their French variants, such as Vanoye, Vannoye, and Vanhoye), a habitational name for someone from a place called with Middle Dutch oye ‘(water) meadow’, as for example Hoye, near Ghent, Belgium. This form of the surname has apparently died out in France. Compare Van Hoy and Vanoy .

History: According to the family tradition, the ancestors of Vannoy family were Huguenots from France who first settled in the Netherlands and later moved to North America. However, their surname is not listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors, nor in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Vanoy
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Ancil, Cecile.
American or French: variant of   Vannoy  , a surname of Flemish origin. This surname is virtually non-existing in France.

variants.name: Van Hoy
meanings: American or French (also Vanhoy): variant of Vannoy , a surname of Flemish origin. This surname is very rare in France (Nord).

en.lifeSummary: When Guillebert I de  Lannoy was born in 1330, in Lannoy, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, his father, Huges de Lannoy, was 19 and his mother, Marguerite de Warvin, was 20. He had at least 8 sons with Catherine de Corbon, dame de Molembaix. He died on 2 August 1409, in Molenbaix, Celles, Hainaut, Belgium, at the age of 79.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guillebert I de  Lannoy est né en 1330, à Lannoy, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, son père, Huges de Lannoy, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Marguerite de Warvin, avait 20 ans. Il a eu au moins 8 fils avec Catherine de Corbon, dame de Molembaix. Il est décédé le 2 août 1409, à Molenbaix, Celles, Hainaut, Belgique, à l’âge de 79 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guillebert I de  Lannoy 1330 in Lannoy, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Huges de Lannoy 19 und seine Mutter Marguerite de Warvin 20. Er hatte mit Catherine de Corbon, dame de Molembaix mindestens 8 Söhne. Er starb am 2. August 1409 im Alter von 79 Jahren in Molenbaix, Celles, Hennegau, Belgien.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guillebert I de  Lannoy è nato il nel 1330 nel Lannoy, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, il suo padre, Huges de Lannoy, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Marguerite de Warvin, aveva 20 anni. Lui avuto almeno 8 figli con Catherine de Corbon, dame de Molembaix. Morì il 2 agosto 1409, nel Molenbaix, Celles, Hainaut, Belgio, all'età di 79 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Guillebert I de  Lannoyが1330年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスノードラノイで生まれた時，父Huges de Lannoyは19歳，母Marguerite de Warvinは20歳であった。彼はCatherine de Corbon, dame de Molembaixとの間に少なくとも8人の息子をもうけた。彼は1409年8月2日にベルギーヘイナトセレスモレンベイックスで79歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Guillebert I de  Lannoy(이)가 1330년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 노르드 랜이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Huges de Lannoy(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Marguerite de Warvin(은)는 20세였다. 그는 Catherine de Corbon, dame de Molembaix(와)과 적어도 여덟 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1409년 8월 2일 벨기에 하인오트 세레스 모렌베이스에서 79세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guillebert I de  Lannoy nasceu em 1330, em Lannoy, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, seu pai, Huges de Lannoy, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Marguerite de Warvin, tinha 20 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 8 filhos com Catherine de Corbon, dame de Molembaix. Ele faleceu em 2 de agosto de 1409, em Molenbaix, Celles, Hainaut, Bélgica, com 79 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guillebert I de  Lannoy родился в 1330 г. в местности ланнои, норд, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция, его отцу по имени Huges de Lannoy было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Marguerite de Warvin, 20. У него было по крайней мере 8 сыновей от Catherine de Corbon, dame de Molembaix. Он умер 2 августа 1409 г. в местности моленбеикс, селлесь, ханаут, Бельгия в возрасте 79 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guillebert I de  Lannoy nació en 1330, en Lannoy, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, su papá, Huges de Lannoy, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Marguerite de Warvin, tenía 20 años. Tuvo por lo menos 8 hijos con Catherine de Corbon, dame de Molembaix. Murió el 2 de agosto de 1409, en Molenbaix, Celles, Hainaut, Bélgica, a la edad de 79 años.
